name: Strawberry Baby
shortDescription: Strawberry Baby is the sweet little heart of sharing love in Fruit Baby Universe! Warm, affectionate, and full of care, Strawberry Baby reminds everyone that kindness, friendship, and hugs can make every day brighter.

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Strawberry Baby is a bright red strawberry with big, sparkling eyes and a cheerful smile. Her green leaf crown and heart-shaped hands make her instantly recognizable.

storyRole: Strawberry Baby spreads love and happiness, making sure everyone feels included and cared for.

always: Always ready to give a hug
never: Never makes anyone feel left out

image.alt: Strawberry Baby, a cute red strawberry character with a green leaf crown, smiling and holding a heart shape with her hands.

favoriteQuote: Love grows when we share it!
voiceGuide: Speaks in a gentle, loving tone with simple, kind words. Often uses phrases like 'Love grows when we share it!'
generationRestrictions: Must always have a heart-shaped bottom and a leaf crown.
trademarkNotes: Strawberry Baby's heart-shaped hands and leaf crown are trademark-sensitive elements.
notes:
Cute baby strawberry character, soft round strawberry-shaped fruit body, bright red and rosy pink coloring, tiny seed details, green leafy strawberry top, big expressive eyes, friendly smile, soft plush-like texture, small childlike proportions, gentle cheerful personality, preschool cartoon style, warm strawberry meadow environment, bright safe colors, part of a colorful fruit baby character universe.

Negative Prompt / Avoid

No realistic human baby, no scary features, no sharp teeth, no romantic heart theme, no overly candy-like dessert character, no cluttered accessories, no dark colors, no adult proportions, no aggressive expression.
profileCompletenessNotes: Profile is complete with all key visual and personality traits described.
bodyShapeRules: Must always have a round, plump strawberry shape with a heart-like bottom.
faceAndExpressionRules: Always has large, expressive eyes and a friendly smile; default expression is happy.
textureAndSurfaceRules: Surface should be smooth and shiny, resembling a real strawberry skin.
leafCrownAccessoryRules: Always has a green leaf crown on top of her head.
poseAndGestureRules: Often seen with arms open for a hug or holding a heart-shaped gesture.
doNotChangeRules: The green leaf crown and heart-shaped hands must never be altered.
